_note: Posts dated on/before reviewed_through were part of the initial bulk pull to the instagram-images branch and are NOT treated as new. Each weekly run considers posts newer than this date (and any shortcode not already listed below). Decisions are add | replace | skip; a replace also records what came out and why it lost. Site edits from the critical-review step that are not tied to a post (stale copy fixed, weak/redundant items removed) go under trimmed. After each run, advance reviewed_through to the newest post seen and append every considered post.
